# HUMAN TODO — Construction Estimator AI System
# Generated by Lead Engineer | Phase-by-Phase Requirements

---

## BEFORE STARTING (One-Time Setup)

### API Keys (fill into .env)
- [ ] **AGENTROUTER_API_KEY** → Get from https://agentrouter.org → Dashboard
- [ ] **OPENAI_API_KEY** → Get from https://platform.openai.com (load $10 minimum — used for embeddings only)
- [ ] **TAVILY_API_KEY** → Get from https://tavily.com (free tier = 1,000 searches/month, no credit card needed)

### Local Tools
- [ ] **Docker Desktop** installed and running
- [ ] **Python 3.11+** installed (`python --version` to verify)
- [ ] **Tesseract OCR** installed:
  - Ubuntu: `sudo apt-get install tesseract-ocr`
  - macOS: `brew install tesseract`
  - Windows: https://github.com/UB-Mannheim/tesseract/wiki
- [ ] **WeasyPrint system deps** installed:
  - Ubuntu: `sudo apt-get install libpango-1.0-0 libpangocairo-1.0-0 libcairo2`
  - macOS: `brew install pango cairo`

### File Setup
- [ ] Copy your **company logo** (PNG, transparent background preferred) → `templates/logo.png`
- [ ] Copy **1–3 past estimation files** (any format: PDF, Excel, Word) → `previous_estimations/`
- [ ] Copy at least **1 sample of each document type you'll use** → into matching `samples/` subfolder:
  - `samples/pdf/` — any PDF blueprint, BOQ, or spec
  - `samples/word/` — any .docx specification or scope document
  - `samples/excel/` — any .xlsx BOQ or pricing file
  - `samples/dwg/` — any .dwg or .dxf floor plan (optional, skip if unused)
  - `samples/scans/` — any hand-drawn or scanned plan (JPG/PNG)

---

## PHASE 0 — Foundation (You do this WHILE I build)

- [ ] Fill in `.env` with all 3 API keys (copy from `.env.example`)
- [ ] Run: `pip install -r requirements.txt`
- [ ] Confirm you can reach AgentRouter: `python core/test_connections.py`
- [ ] Let me know: **What city/region are your projects in?** (e.g., Dubai, Cairo, Riyadh) — needed to set pricing region in knowledge base
- [ ] Let me know: **What currency do you use?** (USD, AED, EGP, SAR, etc.)
- [ ] Let me know: **Your company name and address** (for proposal PDF cover page)

---

## PHASE 1 — Document Parsers + Agent #1

- [ ] Provide at least **1 real PDF file** (text-based BOQ or spec) → `samples/pdf/`
- [ ] Provide at least **1 real .docx file** → `samples/word/`
- [ ] Provide at least **1 real .xlsx file** (BOQ or pricing) → `samples/excel/`
- [ ] (Optional) Provide a **scanned plan or hand-drawn sketch** → `samples/scans/`
- [ ] After I run the ingestion test: **review the extracted output** and tell me what's wrong or missing

---

## PHASE 2 — Agent #0 (Intake) + Agent #2 (QTO)

- [ ] I will test Agent #0 with 5 sample project descriptions — **you review the classification output** and confirm accuracy
- [ ] After QTO runs: **compare the quantity table to a known project** — flag anything obviously wrong

---

## PHASE 3 — Pricing Research + Knowledge Base

- [ ] **CRITICAL**: Provide `knowledge_base/pricing_data.csv` with your historical unit rates
  - Format: `project_type, trade, category, item, unit, rate_low, rate_high, grade, currency, year, region, notes`
  - Minimum 30–50 rows to be useful; more = better accuracy
  - I will provide a starter template if you don't have this
- [ ] After first priced BOQ: **compare rates to your real market rates** and flag outliers

---

## PHASE 4 — Timeline (Agent #4) + QA Auditor (Agent #5)

- [ ] Provide or confirm **productivity rates** in `knowledge_base/productivity_rates.json`
  - I will generate a starter file — you review and adjust the m²/day rates per trade
- [ ] After timeline output: **confirm the durations look realistic** for your market

---

## PHASE 5 — Proposal PDF + Full Pipeline

- [ ] Provide **company details** for `config/company.yaml`:
  - Company name
  - Address (full)
  - Phone / email
  - Website
  - Standard payment terms text
  - Standard exclusions text (if any)
  - VAT/tax percentage (if applicable)
- [ ] Confirm **logo file** is at `templates/logo.png`
- [ ] Confirm **brand color** (hex code) for proposal (e.g., `#1A3C5E`) — or I'll use professional blue
- [ ] **Review the first full PDF proposal** — tell me what to change in layout, sections, wording

---

## PHASE 6 — Hardening + Evaluation

- [ ] Pick **1 real past project** with a known final estimate amount
- [ ] Provide the project documents and description
- [ ] Run the full pipeline on it
- [ ] Compare AI output vs. your actual past estimate
- [ ] Sign off on prototype when accuracy is acceptable (target: ±15%)

---

## ONGOING — As We Build

If I ask you for something specific mid-phase, it will always be:
- An exact **filename** and **folder** to place it in
- A specific **format** (what columns/fields I need)
- A specific **question** about your business rules

---

*This file is updated as the project progresses.*
*Current status: Phase 0 in progress.*
